Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William Taylor, Esq. of Tsao-Wu, (415-777-1688), for Shao Lan Luk, Plaintiff and opposing party.
No other appearance.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs JENNIFER LU, JING YU, CARMEN YU and COLLEEN YU's Motion For Sanctions is DENIED. Plaintiff's complaint does not violate CCCP 128.7(b)(1) or (b)(3). Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
